zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Leeke於大約1367年出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾時，她的父親Simon Leeke40歲，母親Margaret Vaux34歲。她於大約1385年與Sir Godfrey Foljambe III在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1454年10月21日在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Leeke于大约1367年出生在英国越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾时，她的父亲Simon Leeke40岁，母亲Margaret Vaux34岁。她于大约1385年与Sir Godfrey Foljambe III在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1454年10月21日在英国越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世。

nameMeanings.name: Leeke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leake
meanings: habitational name from Leake (Lincolnshire), East and West Leake (Nottinghamshire), Leek (Staffordshire), Leck (Lancashire), Leak (NorthYorkshire), or Leak Hall in Cumberworth (West Yorkshire). The placenames derive from Old English lece or Old Scandinavian lœkr, both meaning ‘brook’. See also Like .
possibly also a nickname from Middle English lek ‘leek’ (Old English lēac), perhaps for a grower or seller of leeks.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Leeke was born about 1367, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, her father, Simon Leeke, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Vaux, was 34. She married Sir Godfrey Foljambe III about 1385, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 21 October 1454, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Leeke est née environ 1367, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Simon Leeke, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Vaux, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Godfrey Foljambe III environ 1385, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 octobre 1454, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Leeke um 1367 in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Leeke 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret Vaux 34. Sie hat um 1385 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England Sir Godfrey Foljambe III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. Oktober 1454 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Leeke è nata il circa 1367 nel Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Simon Leeke, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret Vaux, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Godfrey Foljambe III circa 1385, nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 21 ottobre 1454, nel Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Leekeが約1367年にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルで生まれた時，父Simon Leekeは40歳，母Margaret Vauxは34歳であった。約1385年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルでSir Godfrey Foljambe IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1454年10月21日にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアビンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Leeke(이)가 대략 1367년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Leeke(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Vaux(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 Sir Godfrey Foljambe III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1454년 10월 21일 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 빙함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Leeke nasceu aproximadamente 1367, em Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Leeke, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Vaux, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Godfrey Foljambe III aproximadamente 1385, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1454, em Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Leeke родилась около 1367 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon Leeke было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Vaux, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Godfrey Foljambe III около 1385 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 октября 1454 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности бингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Leeke nació aproximadamente 1367, en Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon Leeke, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Vaux, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir Godfrey Foljambe III aproximadamente 1385, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1454, en Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
